/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/rbc_test.dir/test/main.cpp.o -o ../bin/rbc_test  ../lib/librbc_ble.a ../../vom/lib/libEreon_ObjectModel.a ../../vsys/lib/libvsys.a -ldbus-1 -lbluetooth -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglog.so.0.4.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so.2.2.2 -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libunwind.so
